simplesect.para: BT_MESH_CDB_ITER_CONTINUE to continue to iterate through the nodes or BT_MESH_CDB_ITER_STOP to stop.

briefdescription.para: The global CDB instance is accessible through this variable.

detaileddescription.para: Create and initialize the Mesh Configuration Database. A primary subnet, ie one with NetIdx 0, will be added and the provided key will be used as NetKey for that subnet.

parameterdescription.para: The NetKey to be used for the primary subnet.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or negative error code on failure.

detaileddescription.para: Remove all nodes, subnets and app-keys stored in the database and mark the database as invalid. The data will be cleared from persistent storage if CONFIG_BT_SETTINGS is enabled.

briefdescription.para: Set and store the IV Index and IV Update flag.

detaileddescription.para: The IV Index stored in the CDB will be the one used during provisioning of new nodes. This function is generally only used from inside the stack.
This function will store the data to persistent storage if CONFIG_BT_SETTINGS is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: The new IV Index to use.
True if there is an ongoing IV Update procedure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint8_t uuid[16], uint16_t addr, uint8_t num_elem, uint16_t net_idx)
memberdef.name: bt_mesh_cdb_node_alloc

detaileddescription.para: Allocate a new node in the CDB.
If addr is 0, bt_mesh_cdb_free_addr_get will be used to allocate a free address.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the node's primary element. If 0, the lowest possible address available will be assigned to the node.
Number of elements that the node has.
NetIdx that the node was provisioned to.

simplesect.para: The new node or NULL if CDB has already allocated :kconfig:option:CONFIG_BT_MESH_CDB_NODE_COUNT nodes, or reached the end of the unicast address range, or if addr is non-zero and less than the lowest available address or collide with the allocated addresses.

briefdescription.para: Get the first available address for the given element count.

simplesect.para: The first unicast address in an address range that allows a node with the given number of elements to fit.

detaileddescription.para: Delete a node from the CDB. When deleting the node and the address of the last element of the deleted node is greater than the lowest available address, CDB will update the lowest available address. The lowest available address is reset and the deleted addresses can be reused only after IV Index update.

parameterdescription.para: If true, the node will be cleared from persistent storage.

detaileddescription.para: Assigns the node a new address and clears the previous persistent storage entry.

parameterdescription.para: New unicast address for the node.
Updated number of elements in the node.

detaileddescription.para: Try to find the node that has the provided address assigned to one of its elements.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the element to look for.

simplesect.para: The node that has an element with address addr or NULL if no such node exists.

briefdescription.para: Import device key for selected node.

detaileddescription.para: Using security library with PSA implementation access to the key by pointer will not give a valid value since the key is hidden in the library. The application has to import the key.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or negative error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Export device key from selected node.

detaileddescription.para: Using security library with PSA implementation access to the key by pointer will not give a valid value since the key is hidden in the library. The application has to export the key.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or negative error code on failure.

detaileddescription.para: Iterate nodes in the Mesh Configuration Database. The callback function will only be called for valid, ie allocated, nodes.

parameterdescription.para: Data to pass to the callback.

detaileddescription.para: Allocate a new subnet in the CDB.

simplesect.para: The new subnet or NULL if it cannot be allocated due to lack of resources or the subnet has been already allocated.

detaileddescription.para: Delete a subnet from the CDB.

parameterdescription.para: If true, the subnet will be cleared from persistent storage.

detaileddescription.para: Try to find the subnet with the specified NetIdx.

parameterdescription.para: NetIdx of the subnet to look for.

simplesect.para: The subnet with the specified NetIdx or NULL if no such subnet exists.

briefdescription.para: Get the flags for a subnet.

parameterdescription.para: The subnet to get flags for.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_mesh_cdb_subnet *sub, int key_idx, const uint8_t in[16])
memberdef.name: bt_mesh_cdb_subnet_key_import

briefdescription.para: Import network key for selected subnetwork.

detaileddescription.para: Using security library with PSA implementation access to the key by pointer will not give a valid value since the key is hidden in the library. The application has to import the key.

parameterdescription.para: 0 or 1. If Key Refresh procedure is in progress then two keys are available. The old key has an index 0 and the new one has an index 1. Otherwise, the only key with index 0 exists.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct bt_mesh_cdb_subnet *sub, int key_idx, uint8_t out[16])
memberdef.name: bt_mesh_cdb_subnet_key_export

briefdescription.para: Export network key from selected subnetwork.

detaileddescription.para: Using security library with PSA implementation access to the key by pointer will not give a valid value since the key is hidden in the library. The application has to export the key.

parameterdescription.para: 0 or 1. If Key Refresh procedure is in progress then two keys are available. The old key has an index 0 and the new one has an index 1. Otherwise, the only key with index 0 exists.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or negative error code on failure.

detaileddescription.para: Allocate a new application key in the CDB.

parameterdescription.para: NetIdx of NetKey that the application key is bound to.

simplesect.para: The new application key or NULL if it cannot be allocated due to lack of resources or the key has been already allocated.

detaileddescription.para: Delete an application key from the CDB.

parameterdescription.para: The application key to be deleted.
If true, the key will be cleared from persistent storage.

briefdescription.para: Get an application key by AppIdx.

detaileddescription.para: Try to find the application key with the specified AppIdx.

parameterdescription.para: AppIdx of the application key to look for.

simplesect.para: The application key with the specified AppIdx or NULL if no such key exists.

briefdescription.para: Store application key to persistent storage.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_mesh_cdb_app_key *key, int key_idx, const uint8_t in[16])
memberdef.name: bt_mesh_cdb_app_key_import

detaileddescription.para: Using security library with PSA implementation access to the key by pointer will not give a valid value since the key is hidden in the library. The application has to import the key.

parameterdescription.para: 0 or 1. If Key Refresh procedure is in progress then two keys are available. The old key has an index 0 and the new one has an index 1. Otherwise, the only key with index 0 exists.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or negative error code on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct bt_mesh_cdb_app_key *key, int key_idx, uint8_t out[16])
memberdef.name: bt_mesh_cdb_app_key_export

detaileddescription.para: Using security library with PSA implementation access to the key by pointer will not give a valid value since the key is hidden in the library. The application has to export the key.

parameterdescription.para: 0 or 1. If Key Refresh procedure is in progress then two keys are available. The old key has an index 0 and the new one has an index 1. Otherwise, the only key with index 0 exists.

simplesect.para: 0 on success or negative error code on failure.
